# BTSE REST API

> BTSE is a cryptocurrency exchange. This file lists all REST API endpoints for use by LLM agents, AI code-generation tools, and automated integrations.

## Authentication

All private endpoints require HMAC-SHA384 request signing. Include these three headers in every authenticated request:

- `request-api`: your API key (string)
- `request-nonce`: current timestamp in milliseconds (integer as string)
- `request-sign`: HMAC-SHA384(secret, urlpath + nonce + body)

Public (market-data) endpoints require no authentication.

---

<!-- generated: 2026-04-20T09:30:36Z | total: 16 endpoints -->

## Wallet API
# source: wallet/en/index.html.md

Base URL: https://api.btse.com/spot

### Query available crypto network list for currency

GET /api/v3.2/availableCurrencyNetworks
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/spot/api/v3.2/availableCurrencyNetworks
Auth: None (public)
Description: Get available crypto network list for currency.
Required params: currency

### Query exchange rate between assets

GET /api/v3.2/exchangeRate
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/spot/api/v3.2/exchangeRate
Auth: None (public)
Description: Get the exchange rate between assets.
Required params: srcCurrency, targetCurrency

### Query Wallet Balance

GET /api/v3.2/user/wallet
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/spot/api/v3.2/user/wallet
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Read
Description: Query user's wallet balance. Requires `Read` permissions on the API key.
Required params: none

### Query Wallet History

GET /api/v3.2/user/wallet_history
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/spot/api/v3.2/user/wallet_history
Auth: None (public)
Description: Get user's wallet history records on the spot wallet
Required params: none

### Create Wallet Address

POST /api/v3.2/user/wallet/address
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/spot/api/v3.2/user/wallet/address
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Wallet
Description: Creates a wallet address. If the address created has not been used before, a 400 error will return with the existing unused address. To use this API, `Wallet` permission is required.
Required params: currency, network

### Delete Wallet Address

DELETE /api/v3.2/user/wallet/address
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/spot/api/v3.2/user/wallet/address
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Wallet
Description: Delete  wallet address. If the address has been delete, a 400 error will return. To use this API, `Wallet` permission is required.
Required params: currency, network, address

### Get Wallet Address

GET /api/v3.2/user/wallet/address
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/spot/api/v3.2/user/wallet/address
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Wallet
Description: Gets a wallet address. To use this API, `Wallet` permission is required.
Required params: currency, network

### Withdraw Funds

POST /api/v3.2/user/wallet/withdraw
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/spot/api/v3.2/user/wallet/withdraw
Auth: None (public)
Description: Performs a wallet withdrawal. To use this API, `Withdraw` permission is required.
Required params: currency, address, tag, amount

### Query available currency list for wallet action

GET /api/v3.2/availableCurrencies
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/spot/api/v3.2/availableCurrencies
Auth: None (public)
Description: Get available currency list for wallet action.
Required params: action

### Convert funds

POST /api/v3.2/user/wallet/convert
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/spot/api/v3.2/user/wallet/convert
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Wallet
Description: Performs a currency conversion from wallet. To use this API, `Wallet` permission is required. To get supported currency list please check [Available currency list for action](#query-available-currency-list-for-wallet-action)
Required params: amount, fromAsset, toAsset

### Transfer Funds

POST /api/v3.2/user/wallet/transfer
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/spot/api/v3.2/user/wallet/transfer
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Transfer
Description: Performs a internal currency transfer to other user from wallet. To use this API, `Transfer` permission is required. To get supported currency list please check [Available currency list for action](#query-available-currency-list-for-wallet-action)
Required params: amount, asset, toUser, toUserMail

### Subaccount transfer history

POST /api/v3.2/subaccount/wallet/history
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/spot/api/v3.2/subaccount/wallet/history
Auth: None (public)
Description: Query transfer history for subaccounts
Required params: page, pageSize


## OTC API
# source: otc/en/index.html.md

Base URL: https://api.btse.com/otc

### Market Summary

GET /api/v1/getMarket
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/otc/api/v1/getMarket
Auth: None (public)
Description: Gets OTC market information
Required params: none

### Request for Quote

POST /api/v1/quote
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/otc/api/v1/quote
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Trading
Description: Request for a quote. Requires `Trading` permission.
Required params: baseCurrency, orderCurrency, orderSizeInBaseCurrency, orderAmountInOrderCurrency, clientOrderId, side

### Accept Quote

POST /api/v1/accept/{quoteId}
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/otc/api/v1/accept/{quoteId}
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Trading
Description: Accepts a quote.
Required params: none

### Query Order

POST /api/v1/queryOrder/{quoteId}
Full URL: https://api.btse.com/otc/api/v1/queryOrder/{quoteId}
Auth: HMAC-SHA384  Permission: Read
Description: Query order information. Requires `Read` permission.
Required params: none
